case_title: LINDA WONG VS. CASWELL-MASSEY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT CASWELL-MASSEY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT ASSIGNING JUDGMENT TO ASSIGNEE: LABOR COMMISSION OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, LINDA AS TO DEFENDANT CASWELL-MASSEY OF SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
